overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist exploring ancient Egyptian rooftops at night. The character traverses stone walkways overlooking a river, passes through fire-lit courtyards with NPCs, and surveys the illuminated city from elevated terraces.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated riverside walkway overlooking water and bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along stone balcony overlooking the river and ancient stone bridge

entered.detail: ancient stone arch bridge spanning the river with multiple arches
calm waterway reflecting moonlight below the walkway
tall palm trees lining the far riverbank
low stone parapet wall along the edge of the walkway
ancient stone buildings and walls visible across the river

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated stone walkway overlooking a river at night. An ancient stone bridge spans the water in the distance, while palm trees and city walls line the far banks. The scene is illuminated by moonlight and distant fires.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with fire pit near building entrance

events.description: passes seated NPC sitting by the fire pit against the wall
passes NPC in green dress walking through the doorway ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow courtyard toward a doorway, passing a seated figure by the fire

notable_agents.action: sitting by the fire pit against the stone wall
walking through the doorway in a green dress

entered.detail: circular stone fire pit with burning flames providing warm light
stone archway doorway leading into the building
enclosed stone-paved courtyard area between walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open riverside into a narrow, fire-lit courtyard. A seated NPC rests by the burning fire pit on the left, while another NPC in green walks through the stone archway ahead. The warm firelight contrasts with the cool moonlight of the previous area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with seating overlooking city panorama

events.description: exits doorway onto open rooftop terrace with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: emerging onto rooftop terrace and looking out over the illuminated cityscape

entered.detail: colorful floor cushions and rugs arranged on the rooftop for seating
metal brazier with burning coals providing light and warmth
expansive view of the ancient city with numerous buildings and lights
tall tower structure visible in the distance among the buildings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the doorway onto an open rooftop terrace furnished with cushions and a burning brazier. The camera pans to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of the ancient city at night, with countless fires and buildings stretching to the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop pathway with laundry drying area

events.description: ascends wide stone stairs to higher rooftop level

agents.ego_description: walking along the rooftop past a clothesline and climbing stone stairs to upper level

entered.detail: wooden structure with hanging fabrics and laundry drying
wide stone staircase leading up to higher rooftop level

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the rooftop past a clothesline with hanging fabrics, heading toward a wide stone staircase. The city panorama shifts to the left as the character ascends to a higher rooftop level, revealing new angles of the ancient architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper rooftop with parapet overlooking lower courtyards

agents.ego_description: exploring the upper rooftop area and looking down over the edge at lower levels

entered.detail: low stone wall along the edge of the upper rooftop

segments.scene_description: The character explores the upper rooftop level, walking along the stone parapet with views down to the lower courtyards and streets. The elevated position offers a commanding view of the surrounding ancient city and distant hills under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit riverside walkway into the heart of a fire-lit city, culminating in a sweeping panoramic vista. It begins with the character traversing an elevated stone path overlooking a river and a distant bridge under the cool glow of the moon. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open waterfront into a narrow courtyard where the lighting transitions to the warm, flickering orange of fire pits and passing NPCs. The camera then follows the character through a stone archway and onto an open rooftop terrace furnished with cushions and a burning brazier. Finally, the view expands into a breathtaking panorama of the ancient city, revealing a horizon filled with countless lights and buildings stretching into the night.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across ancient Egyptian rooftops that ascends from a narrow walkway to a commanding panoramic vantage point. It begins with the character moving past hanging fabrics on a clothesline, heading toward a wide stone staircase. As the character climbs, the city panorama shifts to the left, revealing new angles of the architecture while transitioning to a higher rooftop level. The scene then expands as the character walks along a stone parapet, looking down upon the lower courtyards and streets. Finally, the perspective opens fully to offer a sweeping view of the surrounding illuminated city and distant hills under the night sky.
